title: Sum of Even Numbers After Queries

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4], queries = [[1,0],[-3,1],[-4,0],[2,3]] Output: [8,6,2,4] Explanation: At the beginning, the array is [1,2,3,4]. After adding 1 to nums[0], the array is [2,2,3,4], and the sum of even values is 2 + 2 + 4 = 8. After adding -3 to nums[1], the array is [2,-1,3,4], and the sum of even values is 2 + 4 = 6. After adding -4 to nums[0], the array is [-2,-1,3,4], and the sum of even values is -2 + 4 = 2. After adding 2 to nums[3], the array is [-2,-1,3,6], and the sum of even values is -2 + 6 = 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: [8,6,2,4] Explanation: At the beginning, the array is [1,2,3,4]. After adding 1 to nums[0], the array is [2,2,3,4], and the sum of even values is 2 + 2 + 4 = 8. After adding -3 to nums[1], the array is [2,-1,3,4], and the sum of even values is 2 + 4 = 6. After adding -4 to nums[0], the array is [-2,-1,3,4], and the sum of even values is -2 + 4 = 2. After adding 2 to nums[3], the array is [-2,-1,3,6], and the sum of even values is -2 + 6 = 4.
